issues.source_line: f"THE LESSON: the MARGIN (and pref-accuracy) is the OPTIMIZATION TARGET (it moves by construction); held-out exact-match is the CAPABILITY metric. DPO maximizes a RELATIVE margin, so logp_chosen can fall while logp_rejected falls faster — the margin can rise while generation does not improve. NOTE: pref-accuracy saturates near 1.0 at the init (ranking is easier than generating), so the margin is the faithful 'did the objective move' signal; do not read a preference rise as a capability win.",
